name: sword
description: A plain iron blade, friend of many an adventurer.
description 2: As well as decent damage, it's heavy enough to knock smaller enemies back a bit.

name: rapier
description: A well-made blade, expertly balanced.
description 2: Rapiers do moderate damage but you can attack more often with them.

name: fine rapier
description: A beautiful, deadly stabbing blade.
description 2: Rapiers do moderate damage but you can attack more often with them.

name: katana
description: A deadly, razor sharp sword.

name: cutlass
description: A heavy, brutal sword that can block a good deal of damage
description 2: Hits hard, knocks back, protects  a bit -- nice.

name: venomblade
description: This nasty, underhanded weapon is permanently coated in poison.
description 2: Creates poison clouds on the target.

name: round shield
description: A round wooden shield.
description 2: Protects a bit against physical damage.

name: kite shield
description: A sturdy kite shield offering good protection.

name: torch
description: A blazing torch that casts bright light all around.
description 2: Lights up the area, potentially changing how creatures and plants behave.  Also helps you go a bit faster.

name: chain mail
description: Mail made of rings.
description 2: It protects you somewhat against physical attacks.

name: scale mail
description: Overlapping iron scales on a leather backing.
description 2: It protects you fairly well against physical attacks.

name: heavy plate mail
description: Thick plates of steel encase your body.
description 2: Lots of protection against physical attack, at the cost of speed.

name: dagger
description: A short bladed dagger, a classic weapon.
description 2: Not especially deadly but strikes rapidly.

name: throwing knife
description: This well balanced knife can be thrown from some way off.
description 2: Minor magic helps it return to its thrower -- a bit.

name: heavy dagger
description: A fine dagger capable of slicing a foe to ribbons.
description 2: Often manages to get right past a foe's armor plates.

name: nimble amulet
description: A complex magical token that helps you move faster.

name: precise amulet
description: An intricate sign traced in silver, it seems to aid your precision in combat.

name: protective amulet
description: A blue, shield shaped gem in a gold setting.
description 2: Protects from physical blows.

name: warding amulet
description: A grey, unremarkable amulet to look at.
description 2: Protects from magical and energy attacks.

name: glowing amulet
description: A pale gem set in silver, it shines brightly.
description 2: Light can change how creatures and plants act.

name: cherry bomb
description: A small bomb.

name: fire bomb
description: A flask of unstable alchemy.
description 2: On impact, deals damage and ignites tiles around the target.

name: blast bomb
description: A heavy iron sphere full of magical powder.
description 2: Damages and pushes away everything around the point of impact.

name: shock bomb
description: A ball of tightly coiled wire that can release powerful current.
description 2: Lighting bolts arc from foe to foe, doing extra damage to wet targets.

name: freeze bomb
description: A frosted vial that shatters into a freezing burst.
description 2: Chills enemies, extinguishes flames.

name: oil bomb
description: A glass sphere of dark oil. Shatters and slicks the floor on impact.
description 2: Oil is highly flammable.

name: void bomb
description: A powerful bomb that draws in matter, creating a void.
description 2: Destroys floors and pulls creatures toward it.

name: healing potion
description: A vial of healing elixir.
description 2: It doesn't work instantly, it helps you regenerate over time.

name: power orb
description: A sphere of power that makes you stronger.
description 2: Absorbed by touching.

name: wand of water
description: A pale blue wand that drips with water.
description 2: Creates a pool of water at the target location.

name: wand of oil
description: A dark wand slick to the touch.
description 2: Creates a layer of oil at the target location.

name: wand of vegetation
description: A green wand bound with vine.
description 2: Engenders vegetation at the target point.

name: wand of fungus
description: A spongy red-brown wand.
description 2: Causes mushrooms to grow at the target area.

name: wand of fire
description: A blackened wand crackling with embers. Ignites the target.
description 2: Spreads fire around the target point

name: wand of dog
description: A wand decorated with a small animal head.
description 2: Summons a loyal dog to protect you.

name: wand of detonation
description: A blackened iron wand inlaid with red runes. Detonates the target tile in a ball of fire.
description 2: Blows the target location to smithereens.

name: wand of magic missile
description: A short wand topped with a pale chip of crystal.
description 2: Sends out a magical bolt that does moderate damage.

name: wand of banishment
description: A wand bound in tarnished silver and tipped with flickering crystals.
description 2: This specialized wand can instantly banish creatures that are not really real.

name: wand of lightning
description: A wand that crackles with energy.
description 2: Effect jumps from target to target and is stronger in water -- beware.

name: wand of polymorph
description: A wand that constantly shifts and changes.
description 2: Can turn a creature into something else.

name: pear
description: A ripe green pear.
description 2: A surprisingly common and nutritious food.

name: delicious fish
description: A small fresh fish.
description 2: So tasty that a stray cat or dog you throw it to will follow you for the rest of its life.

name: scrumptious pear
description: A specially ripe pear, dripping with juice. Five times more filling than the ordinary kind.

name: silvery pear
description: A pear with skin that shimmers like polished silver. Mysterious.

name: conference pear
description: A long elegant pear, reportedly the kind eaten at high meetings.

name: potion of sorcery
description: A glittering brew that infuses the drinker with magical energy.
description 2: Increases the power of wands while its effects are active.

name: potion of ghostliness
description: A swirling pearl-grey liquid.
description 2: The drinker becomes briefly ethereal and can pass through walls.

name: potion of invisibility
description: A clear potion that hides the imbiber from sight for a short while.
description 2: Invisibility ends if you attack.

name: potion of poison
description: A sickly green elixir. Vile to drink, devastating to throw.
description 2: If thrown, creates a puff of poison vapor.

name: potion of insight
description: A clear potion that crackles faintly.
description 2: Reveals the layout of the entire level on a draught.

name: potion of levitation
description: A fizzy potion that seems to weigh nothing.
description 2: Confers levitation on the drinker.

name: potion of perception
description: A glutinous potion that seems made of eyeballs.
description 2: Allows the drinker to percieve distant creatures.

name: foul meat
description: A rotting, disgusting gob of mystery meat.
description 2: There are probably particularly vile creatures that would be glad to be given this.

name: ant jelly
description: Ants make this ultra nourishing jelly, as healthy as it is revolting.
description 2: Regenerates health.

name: tasty meat
description: A plump pink chunk of tasty meat.

name: ipwergis-pudding
description: Ipwergis-pudding is a magically delectable food with many powers.
description 2: Grants insights if eaten; magical creatures might be very pleased to be given it.

name: grappling hook
description: A hook on a strong rope.
description 2: Can pull enemies -- smaller ones, at least -- toward you.

name: grapplevine
description: This powerful magical vine wraps itself around a foe, allowing you to haul them nearer.
description 2: Can pull enemies -- even quite large ones -- toward you.

name: frog of jumping
description: A very lifelike small enamel frog -- or is it a real frog staying very still?
description 2: Use it from a quickslot to jump rapidly away from or toward your foes.

name: frog of somersaulting
description: A multicolored enamel frog -- or is it a real frog staying very still?
description 2: Use it from a quickslot to jump rapidly away from or toward your foes.

name: blinkstone
description: A very lifelike small enamel frog -- or is it a real frog staying very still?
description 2: Use it from a quickslot to jump rapidly away from or toward your foes.

name: healthpill
description: A valuable scrap of health.
description 2: Absorbed instantly on touching.

name: chargepill
description: A scrap of magical energy for your items.
description 2: Absorbed instantly on touching.
